warnings: Confirmed lineups/formations are unavailable for most future group-stage matches and must not block pre-tournament quiniela generation.
Market data is partial; use visible odds as confidence/risk contrast only, not replacement for Core.

Names may require baseline alias mapping for South Korea/Korea Republic, Czechia/Czech Republic, Bosnia and Herzegovina/Bosnia-Herzegovina, Turkiye/Türkiye/Turkey, Curacao/Curaçao, Ivory Coast/Côte d’Ivoire, and DR Congo/Congo DR.
No official team matchups, kickoff times or venues are asserted.
Official group draw, kickoff UTC and venues are pending.
Research is pre-tournament; refresh tomorrow morning before final submission if time allows.
This file contains structural slots only.
